schulung.label: Schulung
schulung.description:
A reference to a LivingApp record from the target lookup app 'Schulungskatalog' with the id `693ffd1b64c092bd3fb64dec` (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be a valid record URL in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/rest/apps/693ffd1b64c092bd3fb64dec/<record-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

startdatum.label: Startdatum und -uhrzeit
startdatum.description:
A specific moment in time consisting of year, month, day, hour and minute (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>T<HH>:<MM>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29T11:30`.
